name: Savoury Party
instructions: 1. Slice the goat cheese into one-inch pieces and place in a single layer on a large platter. 2. Drizzle the olive oil over the cheese, then sprinkle the sun-dried tomatoes, black olives, fresh basil, and fresh rosemary on top. 3. Using toothpicks, insert the garlic cloves into the cheese throughout the mixture. 4. Allow the mixture to marinate for 6 hours, or overnight, in the refrigerator. 5. Remove the toothpicks and serve with sliced French bread.
simpleInstructions: 1. Slice the cheese and lay on a platter. 2. Add the oil, tomatoes, olives, basil, rosemary. 3. Insert the garlic with toothpicks. 4. Marinate for 6+ hours in the fridge. 5. Serve with French bread.
